name: Email Bridge
description: Email bridge: polls an IMAP inbox and routes incoming emails through the active AI flow, then sends replies via SMTP.

provides_nodes.name: Email Input
provides_nodes.description: Gates flow execution to emails received via IMAP polling. Populates _email_from, _email_subject, _email_message_id flow keys.

provides_nodes.name: Email Output
provides_nodes.description: Sends the flow response as a reply email to the originating sender via SMTP.
